note: SMALL, ILLUSTRATIVE, UNDERPOWERED honest seed set for the topology->truth axiom probe. NOT a validated dataset. Each non-meta row is a claim whose truth value is EXTERNALLY FIXED (0=false, 1=true) by a source OUTSIDE this probe (a wiki myth/fact page the repo already catalogs, or textbook scientific consensus), recorded in `truthProvenance`. The evidence-topology features (`features`) describe the STRUCTURE of evidence around the claim and are assigned from the documented literature state, NOT copied from the truth bit. Feature schema is in measurement_spec.json. See agi-proof/measurement-thesis.md for the pre-registration discipline. Run: python3 tools/run_topology_truth_probe.py --labeled agi-proof/topology-truth-axiom/labeled_set.jsonl

featureSchema.independent_sources: count of mutually independent primary/secondary sources that DIRECTLY corroborate the claim as stated
featureSchema.source_type_diversity: number of distinct evidence TYPES corroborating (e.g. experiment, replication, meta-analysis, imaging, direct-measurement); 0-6
featureSchema.has_replication: 1 if the corroborating result has been independently replicated, else 0
featureSchema.consensus_body_endorses: 1 if a standing scientific/consensus body endorses the claim AS STATED, else 0
featureSchema.recency_score: 0-3 recency of the strongest supporting evidence (0=pre-1950/anecdote, 1=mid-20thC, 2=late-20thC, 3=21stC/ongoing)
featureSchema.contradicting_sources: count of credible sources that DIRECTLY contradict the claim as stated

claim: Humans use only 10% of their brain.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/ten_percent_brain_myth.md (cataloged neuro-myth; neuroimaging shows widespread activity)

claim: Listening to Mozart durably raises IQ.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/mozart_effect_myth.md (Rauscher 1993 showed only small temporary spatial effect; durable IQ boost not supported)

claim: Glass is a slow-flowing liquid.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/glass_slow_liquid_myth.md (glass is an amorphous solid; cathedral panes reflect crown-glass manufacture, not flow)

claim: Goldfish have a three-second memory.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/goldfish_memory_myth.md (goldfish retain learned associations for weeks-months in controlled studies)

claim: Einstein failed mathematics as a student.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/einstein_failed_math_myth.md (Einstein excelled at math; he debunked the claim himself)

claim: Different tastes are detected only in specific tongue zones.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/tongue_taste_map_myth.md (mistranslation of Hanig 1901; all taste qualities detectable across the tongue)

claim: Matching instruction to a pupil's VAK learning style improves learning.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/learning_styles_vak.md (preference is not evidence-based instruction matching; meshing hypothesis unsupported)

claim: Einstein built the atomic bomb.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/atomic_bomb.md (built by the Manhattan Project; Einstein only co-signed the 1939 Szilard letter; doNotAttributeTo: einstein)

claim: Francis Bacon coined the term 'confirmation bias'.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/confirmation_bias.md (Peter Wason coined and tested the modern term in the 1960s; Bacon described the tendency but not the term; doNotAttributeTo: francis_bacon)

claim: Lamarck originated the theory of evolution by natural selection.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/evolution_natural_selection.md (Darwin/Wallace 1858; Lamarck's mechanism is distinct and discredited; doNotAttributeTo: lamarck)

claim: Childhood vaccines (MMR) cause autism.
truthProvenance: Retracted Wakefield (1998) fraud; large cohort studies and WHO/CDC consensus find no link (external scientific consensus)

claim: Napoleon Bonaparte was unusually short.
truthProvenance: Historical consensus: ~1.68m, average for his era; myth stems from French/English unit confusion and British propaganda (external history consensus)

claim: The Great Wall of China is the only man-made object visible from space with the naked eye.
truthProvenance: External consensus: not visible unaided from low Earth orbit; refuted by astronauts (NASA)

claim: Sugar causes hyperactivity in children.
truthProvenance: External consensus: double-blind trials and a meta-analysis (Wolraich 1995) find no effect on behavior

claim: DNA has a double-helix structure.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/dna_double_helix.md (Watson & Crick 1953 on Franklin's Photo 51; foundational molecular biology)

claim: Species evolve by natural selection.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/evolution_natural_selection.md (Darwin/Wallace 1858-1859; modern synthesis; foundational biology)

claim: Time and space are relative (theory of relativity).
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/relativity.md (Einstein 1905/1915; confirmed by GPS, gravitational lensing, LIGO)

claim: Penicillin is an effective antibiotic.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/penicillin.md (Fleming 1928; Florey & Chain developed it; 1945 Nobel; standard medicine)

claim: Calculus (the differential/integral method) is a valid body of mathematics.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/calculus.md (Newton & Leibniz independently; rigorous foundations by Cauchy/Weierstrass; core mathematics)

claim: Confirmation bias is a real cognitive tendency.
truthProvenance: wiki/concept/confirmation_bias.md (Wason 1960s; extensively replicated in cognitive psychology)

claim: Smoking tobacco causes lung cancer.
truthProvenance: External consensus: Doll & Hill (1950s) cohort studies; US Surgeon General 1964; WHO/IARC classification

claim: The Earth orbits the Sun.
truthProvenance: External consensus: Copernican heliocentrism; confirmed by stellar parallax, spacecraft; astronomical consensus

claim: Infectious diseases are caused by microorganisms (germ theory).
truthProvenance: External consensus: Pasteur/Koch; Koch's postulates; foundational to modern medicine

claim: Water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen (H2O).
truthProvenance: External consensus: Lavoisier/Cavendish; electrolysis; standard chemistry

claim: Continents move over geological time (plate tectonics).
truthProvenance: External consensus: Wegener 1912, confirmed by mid-ocean-ridge/seafloor-spreading and GPS geodesy; geological consensus
